column1: Hey Hannah, thanks for your interest in rolling with us at SpringBreak U. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text you in a few to get you squared away with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy here with SpringBreak U
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options for that week
Word I got you! which destination were you lookin to book?
I'd say Punta Cana and Cancun for sure
How many ppl in your group? ill send you a breakdown
thats perfect. you all form the same school?
fire campus, y'all gotta be havin a good time
im gonna send you a breakdown of how everything works, pricing etc. were y'all lookin to get things squared away today?
whats the best email to send the options to?
sent that over a few mins ago lmk if you got it
We really like the Occidental Punta Cana
Occidental Punta Cana is dope for sure. its pretty nice and its gotten more popular than usual with college students this year
we'd have to move rather quickly if you want to reserve tho, we're super low on inventory there rn
Alcoholic beverages and food are included right?
What's the time frame? How much is the deposit and is it per person or for the group?
the time frame is 5 nights march 8-13. the deposit is $350 per person to secure their spot. each person gets their own account and makes their own payments
was everyone ready to get things situated
How long could we wait till we pay the deposit?
theres honestly only a few rooms left for the occidental punta cana in our inventory so i'd recommend securing one of them asap. once its sold out theres nothin we can do unfortunately
When would total amount be due?
About the 2nd week of January depending on when we move forward with securing it
Kk we should be ready to proceed just waiting for final ok
okay cool, I'll get things prepared for you in the meantime
Hey morning, got the final ok?
hey hey, is the group ready to get things started for spring break
Hey sorry it's been a fiasco. A girl pulled out but now we may have a larger group of 8
word thats fine. I can set your reservation up now
Occidental Punta Cana march 9-14 right? let me just make sure we have it
hey what's up were the 8 of you ready to get that reserved
what's good hannah wanted to give you a heads up rates for our occidental punta cana packages are going up tomorrow
did y'all still want to get things secured for the 9-14?
No sorry we have made other arrangements, thanks for all your help tho
Hey! Wondering what was still available for a group of 2 for a good price
hey yea I got you lets see
you were looking to do Punta Cana right
Yea but at this point whatever is still available
your week is def pretty right right now. We can do the Occidental Caribe march 8-13 or in Cancun we have the grand oasis and krystal hotel
they all range from 650-850 per person. which one did you want to look at?
for cheapest youll want to do a 4 night option, cancun package with grand oasis package is 606, punta cana option with occidental caribe is 678
hey did we want to lock in the cancun package?
hey did you still need help with spring break or you all set?
hey any word on what we wanna do for spring break?
yoo what's up HG it's Spiffy from Spring Break U. hope summer went smooth
y'all lookin to plan anything for spring break this school year?
Hey yes we are!!! We will go ahead and start getting a group together.
bet! lets do it. We still thinkin Punta Cana maybe? its probably the most affordable
Yes, I'm thinking so... I'll let you know more soon
Okay cool. I'll send over a few options so you all can look through them
Do you know which week your spring break is?
We've got a group of 4 now what would that look like
thats perfect actually. rooms sleep up to 4 ppl
everyone interested in more of a party vibe?
We are open to it, but wanted maybe a more chill option
hey what's up sorry I was out a few days
Im gonna send over some party and chill options y'all can look though this week. which email should I send to?
Loved “Im gonna send over some party and chill options y'all can look though this week. which email should I send to?”
just sent that over lmk if it came through
if you don't see it can also check your promotions folder sometimes it gets filtered there
hey Hannah what's up, still looking to get situated for spring break?
Yes we are! It would be a group of 4 and we are looking for the most affordable option that's not Cancun!
okay dope! I'll send the updated options over. group of 4 is perfect
heres cancun, I def recommend our grand oasis package https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/booking-quotes/CLWLU8HIKR
lol sorry didn't realize you said not cancun. my b
sup Hannah! you get to check those out?
heyy hannah checkin in, which option the squad liking the best so far?
Hey! We want to do 4 nights with 3 people Occidental Caribe punta Cana!!
awesome lets do it! ill set it up now
were y'all ready to reserve it tonight?
perf. will send it all in 5

did you prefer the occidental caribe over the occidental punta cana? ill personally be at the occidental punta cana, its a little nicer tbh. the rooms are better overall and the resort is like a step up from the caribe
No thank you we like the caribe
just sent over an email with the reservation and step by step how to get situated!
here it is. lmk if you have any questions navigating through https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/P8XOPSXKUM
hey hey, did y'all plan on hopping in that reservation?
Yes we still do we are all going to Nashville this weekend so can we wait to pay till next week? Sorry we didn't realize a payment would be due day of
heyy sorry idk how i missed this, but yea lets touch base when you gyus get back, we can look at the updated pricing and get things rolling
Hannahhhh whats upp, how was Nashville?
hey what's up. y'all ready to secure this reservation for Punta Cana?
hey Hannah checkin in, hows things lookin for spring break?
sup! we still lookin for help with spring break?
Hey! We are all ready to pay today!
okay bet lets do it, will make the reservation for you rn
just emailed it over! lmk if you need any help navigating through and making the payment
Ok thank you! Also, can I use one card for the first payment and then a different card for the next?
yea no prob. we dont store card info
heyy Hannah checkin in, how's everything going? Hope finals went well
nothing at all honestly just wanted to make sure everything was good and see if you needed anything or had any questions about the trip
Aw that's so nice, we are all doing great and I think we are all paid up (hopefully lol) thank you for checking in! I'll lyk if we have any questions
lol yea yup everyone is all set. okay cool sounds good
Hannah whats up! whenever you can, can you and Katherine add your flight details to your accounts so we can prep your transportation
I just added mine I'll get Kat to do it asap
yoo Hannah! I just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all want to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
Hey is the $100 security deposit per person or per room?
Also do we have to print off the voucher pages or is having it on our phone fine?
yo hannah checkin in. apologies I missed your questions while traveling. hows everything going so far? do you have your shuttle times for the airport tomorrow
Fill out this page here, your shuttle time will be emailed to you https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfEqKK3YnRKNnVBlS_k-MS4jEGI5SUIZT6m3D5XTEazTyFvCw/viewform
